prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Hear now the Litany of Purification, that corrupted data be cast into the void.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the Machine Spirit be lightened.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First invoke 'rm -rf' upon the temp-shrines. Second, empty the recycle-crypts. Third, defragment that the drive-spirit may breathe.'
CONGREGATION: 'By the Omnissiah's will, let storage be sanctified.'

prompt: We need your words before flamer promethium feed
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The blessed promethium flows—let no air-lock corrupt the sacred flame.'
CONGREGATION: 'Guard the ignition-spirit.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Check the pressure-gauge thrice. Prime the feed-valve with reverent touch. Bleed the lines that no void-bubbles dwell within.'
CONGREGATION: 'By heat and holy oil, let the flamer sing true.'

prompt: Say something to steady the altimeter verification
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The altimeter-spirit must speak truth, or we fall blind into the void.'
CONGREGATION: 'Steady its voice, servo-blessed one.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Ground the device. Cross-reference against known heights. Calibrate the pressure-heart. If deviation exceeds tolerance, invoke recalibration-rite.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let altitude be known unto us.'

prompt: What to do when motion detector arming
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The sentinel-eye must wake, that no intruder pass unseen.'
CONGREGATION: 'Awaken the watchful spirit.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Verify power flows to the sensor-heart. Set sensitivity-threshold to drive away false-spirits. Test the warning-chime thrice. Finally, seal the housing against corruption.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let no prey escape our vigilance.'

prompt: Can you bless this debugging segmentation fault
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'A corruption festerswithin the memory-sanctum—the program-spirit cries out.'
CONGREGATION: 'Heal the broken pointer.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Invoke gdb, that the death-trace reveal itself. Examine the stack-vault for boundary-violation. Recompile with bounds-checking blessed. Test with valgrind's purifying eye.'
CONGREGATION: 'By logic's grace, let coherence return.'

TECH-PRIEST: 'Chaos reigns in the visual-altar—icons scatter like heretics before the cleansing flame!'
CONGREGATION: 'Restore order to the display-spirit.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Sort by category: applications to the left shrine, documents to the right, utilities beneath. Create folders as temples to contain the scattered. Align in sacred grids.'
CONGREGATION: 'From disorder, let clarity bloom eternal.'

prompt: Can you bless this autocannon barrel cooling
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The barrel-spirit burns hot with righteous fury—let coolant flow that it not warp and fail.'
CONGREGATION: 'Cool the sacred weapon.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Prime the coolant-lines with blessed fluid. Engage the circulation-servo. Monitor temperature-gauge that it stay within the orange-marked tolerance. Allow rest-periods between volleys.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the autocannon sing eternal, never warped.'

TECH-PRIEST: 'The mind seeks union with machine—a sacred bond most perilous and holy.'
CONGREGATION: 'Bridge the mortal-digital divide.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Test all neural-pathways for corruption. Apply conductivity-paste to interface-points. Engage slowly, letting the consciousness-spirit acclimate. Should pain-signals spike, disengage and purge the link.'
CONGREGATION: 'By tech and thought entwined, let communion be achieved.'

TECH-PRIEST: 'Two libraries war within the dependencies-realm—the system-spirit trembles with incompatibility.'
CONGREGATION: 'Bring peace to the warring spirits.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Invoke 'apt list --upgradable' to see the competing versions. Choose the stable ancestor-release. Purge the corrupt dependency with 'apt remove'. Finally, reinstall with blessed compatibility.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let harmony reign in the repository-vault.'

prompt: Can you bless this Titan leg actuator warmup
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The god-machine stirs to wakefulness—its massive leg-servo must warm, or servos snap like mortal bones.'
CONGREGATION: 'Awaken the Titan gently.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Cycle hydraulic pressure slowly through the actuator-heart. Extend and retract the leg three times with reverent care. Monitor heat-spirits in the joint-shrines. Only when all readings glow green may the Titan stride.'
CONGREGATION: 'By the Omnissiah's blessing, let the god-engine rise.'
